page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Miniprot aligns a protein sequence against a genome with affine gap penalty, splicing and frameshift. It is primarily intended for annotating protein-coding genes in a new species using known genes from other species.

page_metadata.galaxy__summary: Align a protein sequence against a genome with affine gap penalty, splicing and frameshift.
